name: Nest JWT Auth
description: Adds JWT authentication to a NestJS project: AuthModule, JwtAuthGuard, @CurrentUser() decorator, login + register endpoints. Detects Drizzle or Prisma and wires up user storage automatically.
author: anesis-dev

commands.name: install
commands.description: Sets up JWT auth using Drizzle ORM for user storage

steps.content:
JWT_SECRET=your-super-secret-key-change-in-production
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=7d
import { AuthModule } from './auth/auth.module';
AuthModule,

commands.name: install
commands.description: Sets up JWT auth using Prisma for user storage

steps.content:
JWT_SECRET=your-super-secret-key-change-in-production
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=7d

model User {
  id           Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  email        String   @unique
  passwordHash String   @map("password_hash")
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  @@map("users")
}
import { AuthModule } from './auth/auth.module';
AuthModule,

commands.name: install
commands.description: Sets up JWT auth infrastructure — wire up user storage manually in auth.service.ts

steps.content:
JWT_SECRET=your-super-secret-key-change-in-production
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=7d
import { AuthModule } from './auth/auth.module';
AuthModule,
